title: Pavlovian Dogs
description: Wolves with a neural network, now you can train them with voice commands!
body: # Pavlovian Dogs Pavlovian Dogs is a mod that gives wolves a neural network and allows you to train them. The mod also uses speech to text to allow you to use voice commands. ### Events There are a few events that will trigger a wolf to perform an action - Ringing a bell - Right clicking the wolf - Saying the wolves name, folowed by any word ### Actions There are a few actions that wolves can perform - Go to the position of the event - Sit down - Attack an entity (if a voice command, the wolf will attack the mob with the name said after the attack phrase) ### Neural Network Modifiers There are a few ways to affect the weights of the neural network - Feeding a wolf encourages the last action with the last event - Saying "good dog" and other similar phrases also encourages wolves, saying the opposite has the opposite effect - Feeding a potion to a wolf will reset its neural network to a random state This is a video made earlier in the development then the current state of the mod.
